mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, category_id, price, original_price, stock, image, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
